title: Creeper Overhaul RP
description: A resource pack that brings the Creeper Overhaul creepers into vanilla Minecraft!
body:
**![](blob:https://imgur.com/3063a971-4efa-4852-8b64-0bc41e6b2897)![](https://i.imgur.com/jJoDs5r.png)**  

**![](https://i.imgur.com/52LU4mv.png)**

A resource pack that brings the Creeper Overhaul creepers into vanilla Minecraft!

**\-Requires the [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) mods or Optifine-**

**DISCLAIMER: FOR ANY VERSION FROM \[1.2\] AND ABOVE I RECOMMEND USING THE [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) AND [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) MODS INSTEAD OF OPTIFINE!!!** 

**To use the pack with Fresh Animations click on here:**  

 

[**![](https://i.imgur.com/KGzi90W.png)**](https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-overhaul-x-fresh-animations)  **

To visit the Mods Page click on here:** 

 

[![](https://i.imgur.com/eIbsQSe.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul)

 

 

**

![](https://i.imgur.com/mnnbI3S.png)**

Josh/Joosh - Art GogoMines - Creating the resource pack JuceDoesThings - Fabric compatibility for 1.18

 

**

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZtjUq8p.png)** [Better Mob Models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-mob-models) \- A Resource Pack that overhauls vanilla mob models and textures in joosh´s artstyle
